# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['development', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select the target environment for the build'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'echo "Building project..." && make build',
            description: 'Custom build command(s) to execute. Separate multiple commands with &&'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running tests..."
make test
echo "Tests completed."''',
            description: 'Custom test script to execute (multi-line supported)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Deploying application..."
echo "Deployment target: $DEPLOY_ENV"
echo "Deployment completed."''',
            description: 'Custom deployment steps to execute (multi-line supported)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRE_BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'echo "Running pre-build steps..."',
            description: 'Commands to run before the build (e.g., dependency installation)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'echo "Running post-deployment verification..."',
            description: 'Commands to run after deployment (e.g., smoke tests, health checks)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory for command execution (relative to workspace)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_ENV_VARS',
            defaultValue: 'APP_VERSION=1.0.0,BUILD_TYPE=release',
            description: 'Comma-separated custom environment variables (KEY=VALUE format)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'ENABLE_DEBUG',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Enable debug mode (set -x for verbose shell output)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_PATH',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Path to artifacts to archive (leave empty to skip archiving)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'NOTIFICATION_EMAIL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Email address for build notifications (leave empty to skip)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DEPLOY_ENV = "${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
        PIPELINE_DEBUG = "${params.ENABLE_DEBUG}"
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "======================================"
                    echo "Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "======================================"
                    echo "Build Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Deployment: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}"
                    echo "Debug Mode: ${params.ENABLE_DEBUG}"
                    echo "======================================"

                    // Parse and set custom environment variables
                    if (params.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS?.trim()) {
                        def envVars = params.CUSTOM_ENV_VARS.split(',')
                        envVars.each { envVar ->
                            def parts = envVar.trim().split('=', 2)
                            if (parts.length == 2) {
                                env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                echo "Set environment variable: ${parts[0].trim()}=${parts[1].trim()}"
                            } else {
                                echo "WARNING: Skipping invalid env var format: ${envVar}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}") {
                    script {
                        def debugPrefix = params.ENABLE_DEBUG ? 'set -x\n' : ''
                        sh """#!/bin/bash
${debugPrefix}
echo ">>> Executing Pre-Build Commands..."
${params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND}
echo ">>> Pre-Build Commands Completed."
"""
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                dir("${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}") {
                    script {
                        def debugPrefix = params.ENABLE_DEBUG ? 'set -x\n' : ''
                        sh """#!/bin/bash
${debugPrefix}
echo ">>> Executing Build Commands..."
echo ">>> Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
echo ">>> Build Commands Completed."
"""
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}") {
                    script {
                        def debugPrefix = params.ENABLE_DEBUG ? 'set -x\n' : ''
                        sh """#!/bin/bash
${debugPrefix}
echo ">>> Executing Test Script..."
${params.TEST_SCRIPT}
echo ">>> Test Script Completed."
"""
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}") {
                    script {
                        if (params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                            input message: "Confirm deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                                  ok: "Deploy to Production",
                                  submitter: "admin,deployers"
                        }

                        def debugPrefix = params.ENABLE_DEBUG ? 'set -x\n' : ''
                        sh """#!/bin/bash
${debugPrefix}
echo ">>> Executing Deployment Script..."
echo ">>> Deploying to: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
${params.DEPLOYMENT_SCRIPT}
echo ">>> Deployment Script Completed."
"""
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT && params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                dir("${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}") {
                    script {
                        def debugPrefix = params.ENABLE_DEBUG ? 'set -x\n' : ''
                        sh """#!/bin/bash
${debugPrefix}
echo ">>> Executing Post-Deployment Commands..."
${params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND}
echo ">>> Post-Deployment Commands Completed."
"""
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACT_PATH?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo ">>> Archiving artifacts from: ${params.ARTIFACT_PATH}"
                    archiveArtifacts artifacts: "${params.ARTIFACT_PATH}", allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "======================================"
                echo "Pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY"
                echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
                echo "======================================"

                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL?.trim()) {
                    mail to: "${params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL}",
                         subject: "SUCCESS: Jenkins Pipeline - ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                         body: """Pipeline completed successfully.

Job: ${env.JOB_NAME}
Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}
Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}

Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
Tests Skipped: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}
Deployment Skipped: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}
"""
                }
            }
        }

        failure {
            script {
                echo "======================================"
                echo "Pipeline FAILED"
                echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
                echo "======================================"

                if (params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL?.trim()) {
                    mail to: "${params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL}",
                         subject: "FAILURE: Jenkins Pipeline - ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                         body: """Pipeline failed. Please investigate.

Job: ${env.JOB_NAME}
Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}
Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
Console Output: ${env.BUILD_URL}console

Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
Tests Skipped: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}
Deployment Skipped: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}
"""
                }
            }
        }

        unstable {
            script {
                echo "======================================"
                echo "Pipeline completed with UNSTABLE status"
                echo "Environment: ${params.BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
                echo "======================================"
            }
        }

        always {
            script {
                echo "Cleaning up workspace..."
                echo "Build duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "Build result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
            }
        }
    }
}
